failure_modes.effect: WS15 cannot pass and the claim compiler output is not admissible.
failure_modes.required_response: Regenerate from canonical ABI policy and fail closed on all stronger claims.
failure_modes.trigger: Compiled claim rows omit required ABI fields or violate typed field semantics.

failure_modes.effect: All stronger claims are invalid and WS15 remains current.
failure_modes.required_response: Downgrade the claim row to BLOCKED_CURRENT and rerun the compiler.
failure_modes.trigger: Any compiled claim widens bootstrap-root-only verifier acceptance, reratified 3-of-3 root execution, or release readiness.

failure_modes.effect: Authority recursion invalidates the compiler output.
failure_modes.required_response: Recompile from cited WS10-WS14 receipts only.
failure_modes.trigger: WS15 outputs cite themselves as authority for a stronger upstream state.

failure_modes.effect: Signer topology and acceptance posture fail closed.
failure_modes.required_response: Freeze progression and reratify identities or role separation explicitly.
failure_modes.trigger: A concrete identity occupies forbidden overlapping trust roles for the same artifact or authority transition.

failure_modes.required_response: Invalidate the claim and revert to the settled ledger-backed truth source.
failure_modes.trigger: Any claim treats a documentary mirror as the active truth source or live authority.

failure_modes.effect: Ledger law is not admissible for current-head claim compilation.
failure_modes.required_response: Fail closed and refresh the supersession evidence before progressing.
failure_modes.trigger: Truth supersession rules or receipts are missing, stale, or contradictory.

failure_modes.required_response: Narrow the claim back to bootstrap-root-only acceptance.
failure_modes.trigger: Any WS15 or later artifact implies threshold-root verifier acceptance without a later explicit acceptance bundle.

failure_modes.required_response: Freeze progression and narrow the release law back to prerequisites only.
failure_modes.trigger: Any artifact claims release readiness or release ceremony execution before WS18.

failure_modes.effect: Verifier release packaging is not admissible.
failure_modes.required_response: Revert to secret-free public evidence only and invalidate the overreaching surface.
failure_modes.trigger: Any declared verifier surface requires private key material, HMAC, or unpublished trust roots for outsider verification.

semantic_boundary.lawful_current_claim: This register captures fail-closed claim ABI, proof-ceiling, identity, ledger, and release-law failure modes for the current bounded KT state.
